# Trenith Tools

> Free browser-based media, PDF, image, music and BYOK AI utilities built by Trenith Technologies Pvt Ltd.

## Canonical pages
- / — platform overview and FAQs
- /tools — complete searchable tool directory
- /connections — session-first and optional encrypted BYOK connection vault
- /studio — AI provider request workspace
- /about — company and authorship
- /privacy — file, URL and key handling
- /terms — responsible-use terms

## Capability labels
- Processed on your device: source files stay in the visitor's browser for the operation.
- Public web source: a server route inspects an authorized public URL for exposed audio links.
- Uses your API key: the visitor connects an external provider account; provider terms, quotas and charges apply.

## Important limits
- There is no artificial Trenith file-count limit, but device memory, storage and browser codec support remain practical limits.
- The public source scanner does not bypass authentication, DRM or platform access controls.
- Trenith does not bundle AI credits or promise that every third-party provider supports every workflow.
